## Summary

<!-- What changed and why (VI or EN is fine) -->

## Type

- [ ] Content / copy (`src/data`, lessons, use cases)
- [ ] UI / components
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs / README
- [ ] Tooling / CI
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run test:smoke` passed (with `npm run preview` on :4321) — or CI is green
- [ ] UI changes: `npm run test:e2e` if nav / language / interactive components touched
- [ ] No secrets (`.env`, `wrangler.toml`, keys) in the diff
- [ ] Bilingual strings updated (vi + en) where applicable
- [ ] Read [CONTRIBUTION_MAP.md](../docs/CONTRIBUTION_MAP.md) — I know which zones I touched
